parameters.subject: Daily request limit reached – Join Issue Collector
parameters.html:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out!

Unfortunately, the daily limit of 10 AI-generated tickets has been reached for today. Your email has been received and will be manually reviewed by our team.

You can expect a response within 1-2 business days.

Best regards,
Join Team

parameters.subject: Your request has been received – Join Issue Collector
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{ $('Extract Fields').first().json.createdByName }},

Great news! Your request has been successfully received and added to our board as a new ticket.

Title: {{ $('Extract Fields').first().json.title }}
Priority: {{ $('Extract Fields').first().json.prio }}
Due date: {{ $('Extract Fields').first().json.dueDate }}

Our team will review it shortly.

Best regards,
Join Team

parameters.subject: =[Manual Review] New customer request
parameters.html:
=

Manual review needed — daily limit was reached.

From: {{ $('Email Trigger (IMAP)').first().json.metadata['return-path'].replace(/[<>]/g, '') }}

{{ $('Email Trigger (IMAP)').first().json.textPlain }}

parameters.subject: Your request has been received – Join Team
parameters.html:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out! We received your email but were unable to automatically process it.

Our team has been notified and will review your request manually within 1-2 business days.

Best regards,
Join Team
